_**Agent (default)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
**Extending home hook**

I'm extending `useHome` to manage independent loading states and pagination for discover, trending, and top-rated rows. I'm implementing reset behavior for genre changes and handling incremental vs. full reloads for rows. 

**Preventing concurrent fetches**

I'm adding state management for row loading indicators to prevent concurrent fetches. 

**Merging fetched pages**

I'm updating the stored data to merge fetched pages with deduplication by ID. I'm implementing scroll detection for horizontal ScrollView using contentOffset and layout measurements. 

**Calculating scroll position**

I'm calculating the visible end index for horizontal scrolling by converting pixel offset to item index. I'm using a heuristic to detect when user is near scroll end by comparing scroll position to content size. I'm calculating the end index visible using `Math.floor((contentOffset.x + layoutMeasurement.width) / itemWidth)` for fixed-width items. I'm refining the scroll position calculation to determine when to load more items based on viewport boundaries. 

I'm calculating the index of the last visible item using `floor((scrollOffset + viewportWidth) / itemWidth)`. I'll trigger loading when `N - firstNotVisibleIndex <= 3`, where firstNotVisibleIndex is the first item not fully visible. </details></think>
